description_long: This object is a generously filled sandwich featuring a soft, lightly browned sub-style bun. The interior is layered with slices of cured meats such as salami and pepperoni, visible alongside fresh vegetables including lettuce, tomato, and red onion. The bread has a slightly rough, flour-dusted surface, while the meats and vegetables add vibrant red, green, purple, and white hues. The sandwich is unwrapped, with no visible condiments or sauces applied. The cross-section reveals the distinct layers of ingredients, making it visually appealing and appetizing. This type of food item is commonly found in urban environments such as delis, food trucks, or park benches.
description: A sub-style sandwich with a soft, brown bun filled with sliced meats and fresh vegetables, unwrapped and visually vibrant.
description_view_0: The top and side of the sandwich are visible, showing the lightly browned, textured bun with minimal filling exposed.
description_view_1: The sandwich is viewed from an angle showing the cross-section, revealing layers of meat, cheese, lettuce, tomato, and onion.
description_view_2: A clear side profile displays the full length of the sandwich, with all interior ingredients—meats, cheese, and vegetables—distinctly visible.
description_view_3: The sandwich is seen from the opposite end, highlighting the bun and a partial view of the colorful filling inside.
